# Realtime

RealtimeKit, SFU and TURN

> Links below point directly to Markdown versions of each page. Any page can also be retrieved as Markdown by sending an `Accept: text/markdown` header to the page's URL without the `index.md` suffix (for example, `curl -H "Accept: text/markdown" https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/`).
>
> For other Cloudflare products, see the [Cloudflare documentation directory](https://developers.cloudflare.com/llms.txt).

## Overview

- [Cloudflare Realtime](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/index.md): Build scalable real-time applications with Cloudflare Realtime products including RealtimeKit, SFU, and TURN.

## RealtimeKit

- [RealtimeKit](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/index.md): Add live video and voice to web or mobile apps with RealtimeKit SDKs and APIs.
- [AI](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/ai/index.md): Add AI-powered transcription and summarization to RealtimeKit meetings.
- [Summary](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/ai/summary/index.md): Generate AI-powered meeting summaries from transcript data in RealtimeKit.
- [Transcription](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/ai/transcription/index.md): Turn on real-time and post-meeting speech-to-text transcription in RealtimeKit.
- [Audio Only Calls](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/audio-calls/index.md): Build audio-only experiences like voice rooms and support lines with RealtimeKit.
- [Video resolution and simulcast](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/best-practices/video-and-simulcast/index.md): Choose the right video resolution, simulcast settings, and frame rate for your RealtimeKit use case to optimize quality and bandwidth.
- [Message Broadcast APIs](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/broadcast-apis/index.md): Send custom broadcast messages to all participants in a RealtimeKit meeting.
- [Storage and Broadcast](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/collaborative-stores/index.md): Create real-time key-value stores and broadcast messages to participants in RealtimeKit.
- [Concepts](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/concepts/index.md): Core concepts and terminology for RealtimeKit including apps, meetings, participants, and presets.
- [Meeting](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/concepts/meeting/index.md): RealtimeKit meetings are reusable virtual rooms for real-time audio and video interaction.
- [Participant](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/concepts/participant/index.md): Add and manage participants in RealtimeKit meetings with tokens and presets.
- [Preset](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/concepts/preset/index.md): Configure participant roles, permissions, and meeting experience with RealtimeKit presets.
- [Session Lifecycle](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/concepts/session-lifecycle/index.md): Understand the lifecycle of a peer in a RealtimeKit session from setup to disconnect.
- [Build using Core SDK](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/index.md): Initialize and build with the RealtimeKit Core SDK for full control over video calls.
- [API Reference](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/api-reference/index.md): API reference for the RealtimeKit Core SDK methods, events, and properties.
- [RealtimeKitClient](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/api-reference/realtimekitclient/index.md)
- [RTKAi](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/api-reference/rtkai/index.md)
- [RTKChat](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/api-reference/rtkchat/index.md)
- [RTKConnectedMeetings](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/api-reference/rtkconnectedmeetings/index.md)
- [RTKLivestream](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/api-reference/rtklivestream/index.md)
- [RTKMeta](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/api-reference/rtkmeta/index.md)
- [RTKParticipant](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/api-reference/rtkparticipant/index.md)
- [RTKParticipantMap](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/api-reference/rtkparticipantmap/index.md)
- [RTKParticipants](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/api-reference/rtkparticipants/index.md)
- [RTKPermissionsPreset](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/api-reference/rtkpermissionspreset/index.md)
- [RTKPip](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/api-reference/rtkpip/index.md)
- [RTKPlugin](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/api-reference/rtkplugin/index.md)
- [RTKPlugins](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/api-reference/rtkplugins/index.md)
- [RTKPolls](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/api-reference/rtkpolls/index.md)
- [RTKRecording](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/api-reference/rtkrecording/index.md)
- [RTKSelf](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/api-reference/rtkself/index.md)
- [RTKSelfMedia](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/api-reference/rtkselfmedia/index.md)
- [RTKStage](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/api-reference/rtkstage/index.md)
- [RTKStore](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/api-reference/rtkstore/index.md)
- [RTKThemePreset](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/api-reference/rtkthemepreset/index.md)
- [Breakout Rooms](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/breakout-rooms/index.md): Create and manage breakout rooms to split participants into smaller groups in RealtimeKit.
- [Chat](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/chat/index.md): Send and receive chat messages in RealtimeKit meetings using the Core SDK.
- [Display active speakers](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/display-active-speakers/index.md): Detect and display active speakers in RealtimeKit meetings using the Core SDK.
- [End a session](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/end-a-session/index.md): End a RealtimeKit session for all participants and stop active recordings.
- [Error Codes](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/error-codes/index.md): RealtimeKit error codes for identifying and troubleshooting SDK and API issues.
- [Local Participant](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/local-participant/index.md): Manage local user media devices, audio, video, and screenshare in RealtimeKit meetings.
- [Manage Participants in a Session](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/manage-participants-in-a-session/index.md): Use RealtimeKit host controls to mute, pin, or remove participants in a live session.
- [Media Acquisition Approaches](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/media-acquisition-approaches/index.md): Acquire and manage participant audio and video tracks in RealtimeKit using different approaches.
- [Meeting Metadata](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/meeting-metadata/index.md): Access meeting state, type, and connection metadata in the RealtimeKit Core SDK.
- [Meeting Object Explained](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/meeting-object-explained/index.md): Explore the RealtimeKit meeting object and its namespaces for participants, chat, polls, and media.
- [Polls](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/polls/index.md): Create, vote on, and manage polls in RealtimeKit meetings using the Core SDK.
- [Remote Participants](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/remote-participants/index.md): Access participant data, display videos, and handle events for remote participants in RealtimeKit.
- [Events](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/remote-participants/events/index.md): Events emitted by RealtimeKit participants for join, leave, pin, and grid changes.
- [Picture in Picture](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/remote-participants/pip/index.md): Render RealtimeKit participant video as a floating Picture-in-Picture tile in the browser.
- [Stage Management](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/stage-management/index.md): Manage webinar stage access and publish permissions in RealtimeKit meetings.
- [Video Effects](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/video-effects/index.md): Add background blur and virtual backgrounds to video feeds in RealtimeKit meetings.
- [Waiting Room](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/core/waiting-room/index.md): Control meeting access with a waiting room that requires host approval in RealtimeKit.
- [FAQ](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/faq/index.md): Frequently asked questions about RealtimeKit meetings, recordings, and SDK usage.
- [Legal](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/legal/index.md): Privacy policy, terms of service, and third-party licenses for RealtimeKit.
- [Third party licenses](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/legal/3rdparty/index.md): Third-party license information for RealtimeKit web, mobile, and recording SDKs.
- [Pricing](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/pricing/index.md): RealtimeKit pricing for audio, video, recording, and transcription features.
- [Quickstart](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/quickstart/index.md): Set up RealtimeKit in your application with API tokens, SDK installation, and your first meeting.
- [Recording](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/recording-guide/index.md): Record RealtimeKit meetings as composite recordings or separate participant audio tracks.
- [Add Watermark](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/recording-guide/add-watermark/index.md): Add a custom image watermark to RealtimeKit recordings with configurable position and size.
- [Set Audio Configurations](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/recording-guide/configure-audio-codec/index.md): Configure audio codec format and channel settings for RealtimeKit recordings.
- [Configure Video Settings](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/recording-guide/configure-codecs/index.md): Configure video codecs, resolution, and container formats for RealtimeKit recordings.
- [Disable Upload to RealtimeKit Bucket](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/recording-guide/configure-realtimekit-bucket-config/index.md): Disable automatic recording uploads to the RealtimeKit R2 bucket using the realtimekit_bucket_config parameter.
- [Create Custom Recording App Using Recording SDKs](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/recording-guide/create-record-app-using-sdks/index.md): Learn how to create a recording app using RealtimeKit's SDKs. Follow our guide for effective app creation and integration.
- [Upload Recording to Your Cloud](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/recording-guide/custom-cloud-storage/index.md): Explore how to set up custom cloud storage for RealtimeKit's recording. Follow our guide for effective configuration and integration.
- [Interactive Recordings with Timed Metadata](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/recording-guide/interactive-recording/index.md): Learn how to enable interactive recording with RealtimeKit's capabilities. Follow our guide for effective configuration and management.
- [Manage Recording Config Precedence Order](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/recording-guide/manage-recording-config-hierarchy/index.md): Learn how to manage recording configuration hierarchy with RealtimeKit's capabilities. Follow our guide for effective hierarchy management.
- [Monitor Recording Status](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/recording-guide/monitor-status/index.md): Track RealtimeKit recording states from invocation through upload completion.
- [Start Recording](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/recording-guide/start-recording/index.md): Start composite recording of a RealtimeKit meeting using the API, SDK, or auto-record flag.
- [Stop Recording](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/recording-guide/stop-recording/index.md): Stop a RealtimeKit recording automatically or manually using the Stop Recording API.
- [Track recording](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/recording-guide/track-recording/index.md): Record separate audio tracks for selected RealtimeKit participants and download per-participant WebM files.
- [Release Notes](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/release-notes/index.md): Release notes and changelog for the RealtimeKit Web Core SDK.
- [Android Core SDK](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/release-notes/android-core/index.md): Release notes and changelog for the RealtimeKit Android Core SDK.
- [Android UI Kit SDK](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/release-notes/android-ui-kit/index.md): Release notes and changelog for the RealtimeKit Android UI Kit SDK.
- [Flutter Core SDK](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/release-notes/flutter-core/index.md): Release notes and changelog for the RealtimeKit Flutter Core SDK.
- [Flutter UI Kit](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/release-notes/flutter-ui-kit/index.md): Release notes and changelog for the RealtimeKit Flutter UI Kit SDK.
- [iOS Core SDK](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/release-notes/ios-core/index.md): Release notes and changelog for the RealtimeKit iOS Core SDK.
- [iOS UI Kit SDK](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/release-notes/ios-ui-kit/index.md): Release notes and changelog for the RealtimeKit iOS UI Kit SDK.
- [Notices](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/release-notes/notice-board/index.md): Important notices and announcements for the RealtimeKit platform.
- [React Native Core SDK](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/release-notes/react-native-core/index.md): Release notes and changelog for the RealtimeKit React Native Core SDK.
- [React Native UI Kit SDK](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/release-notes/react-native-ui-kit/index.md): Release notes and changelog for the RealtimeKit React Native UI Kit SDK.
- [Web UI Kit](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/release-notes/web-ui-kit/index.md): Release notes and changelog for the RealtimeKit Web UI Kit SDK.
- [REST API Reference](https://developers.cloudflare.com/api/resources/realtime_kit/index.md): REST API reference for managing RealtimeKit apps, meetings, participants, and recordings.
- [Select SDK(s)](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/sdk-selection/index.md): Choose between RealtimeKit UI Kit and Core SDK for your platform and framework.
- [Build using UI Kit](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/ui-kit/index.md): Get started with the RealtimeKit UI Kit to add a prebuilt meeting experience to your application.
- [UI Kit Addons](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/ui-kit/addons/index.md): Extend RealtimeKit UI Kit with addon components for host controls, reactions, and more.
- [Component Reference](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/ui-kit/api-reference/index.md): API reference for RealtimeKit UI Kit components, props, and configuration options.
- [Android](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/ui-kit/api-reference/android/index.md): Complete API reference for Android library components

- [rtk-ai](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/ui-kit/api-reference/angular/rtk-ai/index.md): API reference for rtk-ai component (Angular Library)
- [rtk-ai-toggle](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/ui-kit/api-reference/angular/rtk-ai-toggle/index.md): API reference for rtk-ai-toggle component (Angular Library)

- [rtk-audio-grid](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/ui-kit/api-reference/angular/rtk-audio-grid/index.md): API reference for rtk-audio-grid component (Angular Library)
- [rtk-audio-tile](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/ui-kit/api-reference/angular/rtk-audio-tile/index.md): API reference for rtk-audio-tile component (Angular Library)

- [Customise Branding](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/ui-kit/branding/index.md): Customize meeting icons and branding in the RealtimeKit UI Kit.
- [Design System](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/ui-kit/branding/design-system/index.md): Override RealtimeKit UI Kit design tokens for colors, fonts, borders, and spacing.
- [Breakout Rooms](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/ui-kit/breakout-rooms/index.md): Create and manage breakout rooms in RealtimeKit meetings for smaller group discussions.
- [Build Your Own UI](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/ui-kit/build-your-own-ui/index.md): Build a custom meeting interface video UI using RealtimeKit SDK components and Core SDK.
- [Component Library](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/ui-kit/component-library/index.md): Browse prebuilt RealtimeKit UI Kit components for building custom meeting interfaces.
- [Add Custom Controlbar](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/ui-kit/custom-controlbar/index.md): Add a custom controlbar to your RealtimeKit meeting UI with individual components.
- [Add Custom Header](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/ui-kit/custom-header/index.md): Add a custom header to your RealtimeKit meeting UI with individual components.
- [Meeting Locale](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/ui-kit/meeting-locale/index.md): Customize text and localize the RealtimeKit UI Kit meeting interface for different languages.
- [State Management](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/ui-kit/state-management/index.md): Manage and synchronize meeting state across RealtimeKit UI Kit components.
- [Webhooks](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/realtimekit/webhooks/index.md): Receive RealtimeKit events in your application through signed HTTP callbacks.

## Realtime SFU

- [Realtime SFU](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/sfu/index.md): Build real-time serverless video, audio, and data applications with Cloudflare Realtime SFU.
- [Realtime vs Regular SFUs](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/sfu/calls-vs-sfus/index.md): Compare Cloudflare Realtime SFU with traditional centralized SFUs for WebRTC applications.
- [Changelog](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/sfu/changelog/index.md): Changelog and release notes for the Cloudflare Realtime SFU platform.
- [DataChannels](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/sfu/datachannels/index.md): Send arbitrary real-time data between clients using Realtime SFU DataChannels.
- [Demos](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/sfu/demos/index.md): Explore demo applications and interactive visualizations for Cloudflare Realtime SFU.
- [Example architecture](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/sfu/example-architecture/index.md): Reference architecture for building a video calling application with Realtime SFU.
- [Quickstart guide](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/sfu/get-started/index.md): Create your first Realtime SFU app and get your App ID and secret.
- [Connection API](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/sfu/https-api/index.md): Manage Realtime SFU sessions and media tracks using the HTTPS connection API.
- [Introduction](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/sfu/introduction/index.md): Cloudflare Realtime SFU adds low-latency WebRTC audio, video, and data to your applications.
- [Limits, timeouts and quotas](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/sfu/limits/index.md): Realtime SFU rate limits, track timeouts, session constraints, and free tier quotas.
- [Media Transport Adapters](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/sfu/media-transport-adapters/index.md): Bridge WebRTC and other transport protocols using Realtime SFU media adapters.
- [WebSocket adapter](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/sfu/media-transport-adapters/websocket-adapter/index.md): Stream audio and video between WebRTC tracks and WebSocket endpoints using Realtime SFU.
- [Pricing](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/sfu/pricing/index.md): Cloudflare Realtime SFU and TURN pricing, free tier details, and billing information.
- [Sessions and Tracks](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/sfu/sessions-tracks/index.md): Understand Realtime SFU core concepts including applications, sessions, and tracks.
- [Simulcast](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/sfu/simulcast/index.md): Send multiple video quality levels with WebRTC simulcast on Realtime SFU.

## TURN Service

- [TURN Service](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/turn/index.md): Cloudflare Realtime TURN relays WebRTC traffic through NATs and firewalls on a global network.
- [Analytics](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/turn/analytics/index.md): Query Cloudflare Realtime TURN usage metrics and traffic data via the GraphQL API.
- [Custom TURN domains](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/turn/custom-domains/index.md): Use custom domains with Cloudflare Realtime TURN via CNAME DNS records.
- [FAQ](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/turn/faq/index.md): Frequently asked questions about Cloudflare Realtime TURN pricing, credentials, and usage.
- [Generate Credentials](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/turn/generate-credentials/index.md): Create TURN keys and generate short-lived credentials for Cloudflare Realtime TURN clients.
- [Replacing existing TURN servers](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/turn/replacing-existing/index.md): Migrate from self-hosted or third-party TURN servers to Cloudflare Realtime TURN.
- [TURN Feature Matrix](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/turn/rfc-matrix/index.md): Supported TURN protocols, RFCs, and STUN features on Cloudflare Realtime TURN.
- [What is TURN?](https://developers.cloudflare.com/realtime/turn/what-is-turn/index.md): TURN relays traffic through NATs and firewalls to enable peer-to-peer WebRTC communication.
